title: SuperHarvest
description: Fast harvest, mining and tree chopping easily with a single mine, 3 in one to Vein-Mining with Animations but without lag! It's light weight lag free. [Open Source]
body:
![Fast farming showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9GdBr4p2/images/d3aaea40de42e5afe1a9477d90d03b734ce0a357.gif)
> With SuperHarvest, resources can be easily gathered.

## Features
When the right tool is used, it breaks the same resources nearby without lagging your server.

## Commands
- /sh toggle      -   Toggle the SuperHarvest.
- /sh farming    -   Toggle the fast farming.
- /sh mining      -  Toggle the fast mining.
- /sh logging     -  Toggle the fast logging.
- /sh notify       -  Toggle the status notify.
- /sh language <code\> - Set display language.

## Premium Version
If you found this plugin helpful, you can take a look at the permium version here, which introduces a lot of extra convienient features such as fully in-game GUI, placeholders, fast logging depending on leaves, custom chain tool sets.

![Premium edition showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9GdBr4p2/images/b0cea61a5f9e230871299ab0d51d165196bd202d.gif)

## Permissions
- superharvest.use          -  Ｗhether player can use SuperHarvest.
- superharvest.farming    -  Ｗhether player can use fast farming.
- superharvest.mining     -  Ｗhether player can use fast mining.
- superharvest.logging    -  Ｗhether player can use fast logging.
- superharvest.block.<block_id> - Whether player can fast-break the specified block(s)
- superharvest.tool.<tool_id>     - Whether player can fast-break using the specified tool(s).

  <summary>Block and tool permissions list</summary>

- superharvest.tool.netherite_hoe

## Config
<details>
  <summary>Config</summary>

- disable-worlds: []
- enable-farming: true
- enable-mining: true
- enable-logging: true
- cpu-mileseconds-limitation: 3
- notify-actionbar: true
- notify-titlebar: false
- deafult-sneaking-mode: false
- default-language: en_us
- auto-locale: true
</details>

## Support

You can get support, make suggestions or report a bug through the [Discussion tab](https://www.spigotmc.org/threads/superharvest-animated-light-weight-lag-free-fully-configurable-open-source-1-8-1-20-4.562766/) or on our [Discord Server ](https://discord.gg/9c287zPpUZ). If you find this plugin helpful, please consider leaving a review.
